title: Generate a REST API endpoint for Order Management
scenario: Create an API endpoint for order management. The endpoint should allow users to create, read, update, and delete orders. The API should also handle order status updates. The target output should be a Swagger API definition in YAML format. The output should be under 300 words and follow the standard Swagger v2.0 syntax.
constraints: Must include endpoints for order creation, reading, updating, and deletion

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Swagger definition follows the standard v2.0 syntax
Verify if the API endpoint includes order creation, reading, updating, and deletion endpoints, and handles order status updates
Check if the Swagger definition is clear and easy to read
